title: Gomer #1586
definition:
Gomer = "complete"

 n pr m
 1) the eldest son of Japheth and grandson of Noah; the progenitor of
    the early Cimmerians and other branches of the Celtic family

 n pr f
 2) the unfaithful wife of the prophet Hosea; Hosea's relationship
    with her was symbolic of God's relationship with wayward Israel
